title: Caught in a Doc Template Creation Loop

posts.author: SevenRooT (Seven Stevens)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

Does anyone have access to the information required to create a Doc template? The information provided by monday.com is scant, as well as self-referential.

In other words, the web pages that reference monday.com Docs each suggest a link to follow to learn more, and those links are linked in a loop that never divulges the actual information, just keeps bringing you back to the 1 of 3 pages.

Help?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @SevenRooT,

Sorry to hear this - thank you for bringing this to our attention

Can you let me know if this article provides you with the information you’re looking for? It doesn’t seem to be triggering a loop for us, so if it does, would you be happy to let us know the specific link/section?
